metadata.description: haxlys's curated agent skills marketplace. Local installable skills live in ./skills; vendored upstream snapshots live in ./vendored.

plugins.name: web-design-reviewer
plugins.description: Visual inspection of websites to identify and fix design issues. Vendored from github/awesome-copilot (MIT).

plugins.name: web-component-design
plugins.description: Master React, Vue, and Svelte component patterns. Vendored from wshobson/agents (MIT).

plugins.name: react-doctor
plugins.description: Diagnose and fix React code issues — security, performance, correctness, architecture. Outputs a 0-100 score with actionable diagnostics. Vendored from millionco/react-doctor (MIT).

plugins.name: react-performance
plugins.description: Modern React performance review workflow: state colocation, children composition, React Compiler-aware memoization, concurrent rendering, lazy loading, profiling, and common re-render hazards.

plugins.name: understand-anything
plugins.description: Multi-agent pipeline that builds a knowledge graph of any codebase + interactive dashboard. Use to onboard, explain, or trace architecture across files/functions/classes/dependencies. Referenced upstream (always latest).

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0). Bundles 5 specialized sub-skills loaded on demand via `agent-browser skills get <name>`: electron (Electron desktop apps), slack (Slack workspaces), vercel-sandbox (microVM Chrome), agentcore (AWS Bedrock cloud browser), dogfood (exploratory QA).

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: obra/superpowers — TDD, debugging, planning, code review, worktree workflows. Referenced upstream (always latest).

plugins.name: hermes-tweet
plugins.description: Hermes Agent plugin for X/Twitter research, trends, monitored context, and gated account actions. Referenced upstream (always latest).
